Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is... a box full of sawdust...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...Today, we're usin' that to make tempura bowls.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Go ahead and take out what's in the box.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a box of shrimp![n]Living... wriggling... shrimp...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 6 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Getting these delivered is a royal pain in the ass, so I went and got 'em just now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 0 25 25}I'm gonna get the other stuff ready. You focus on prepping those guys.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 0 25 25}I'll handle the first one, so pay attention and just do the same.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 6 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}...Sorry, but I gotta work on the fish and other parts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 0 25 25}I'll do the first one, and then you do the rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}First, put it on its back. Then, you work the knife into the edge of the shell...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 0 25 25}I'll do the first one, and then you do the rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}First, put it on its back. Then, you work the knife into the edge of the shell...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I struggled to prep the live shrimp,[n]following Aragaki's instructions...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We managed to work together[n]to finish the tempura bowls![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}...The taste is pretty good, although I guess we did use good shrimp.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}You've gotten a lot better too. You're more comfortable with the knife and fryer now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}All you gotta do now is keep practicin'.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Get the basics down, then just find the right way to cook the stuff you have.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Hah, more like, a stubborn old man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I'd say... he was an oddball who couldn't mind his own business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}A long time ago, I used to work part-time at a restaurant.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}The manager drilled me on how to cook. He gave me so much shit back then, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}When I think back on it now, it wasn't really a bad experience.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}He always used to say, "Learning to cook is the first step to supporting yourself."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}If I didn't know how to do it myself, I wouldn't be teaching you like I am right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I ain't gonna teach you every little thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 1 25 25}I can at least be here to show you how it's done. Gives me somethin' to do, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aragaki has a genuine smile on his face...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}...Oh, right. Let's eat up and then put everything away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}You can head back to your room once you're finished. I'll handle the cleanup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}...I gotta make Koromaru's dinner still.[n]{f 1 1}
